original_image_tags: Two dark, circular US postage stamps affixed to the upper right corner. The left stamp is fully visible; the right stamp is partially obscured by the postmark and torn edge.

elements.description: One circular postmark stamp with text 'ALEXANDRIA, VA', 'MAR 27', '7-PM', '1957'. One rectangular postage stamp with a dark illustration of a standing figure, partially torn at the top right corner. Handwritten annotation 'AIRMAIL' with a line underneath, located to the right of the recipient address. Handwritten blue annotation in the top left corner, illegible.

judge.reason: Description A describes two circular postage stamps, while Description B describes one circular postmark and one rectangular postage stamp, creating a direct contradiction in the number and shape of the visual stamp elements.
